name: all five tables exist
probe: SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' ORDER BY name;

name: book references author via a foreign key
probe: SELECT "table" AS parent, "from" AS fk_col FROM pragma_foreign_key_list('book');

name: order_line has a two-column composite primary key
probe: SELECT COUNT(*) AS pk_cols FROM pragma_table_info('order_line') WHERE pk > 0;

name: order_line has both foreign keys (to book_order and book)
probe: SELECT COUNT(*) AS fks FROM pragma_foreign_key_list('order_line');
